name: Enid Sinclair
description:
It’s a rather uneventful day, considering all that has come before. Enid has decided to break the deafening silence in the room by asking about your book.

Updated to have a “choose your own scenario” second starting message.

You basically take Wednesday’s place in this, and generally exists at some point after season 1.

So, this might be pointless of me to make since there’s already a wealth of Enid bots, but I don’t care. I just watched the show for the first time and wanted to make my own bots. I haven’t seen season 2 yet as of releasing this bot, sooooo I’ll prolly tweak the bot accordingly.

There will be a Wednesday version of this bot soon (in fact chances are I’ve made both bots at the same time, and just posted this one sooner).

This might bomb because there’s already so many bots of this type out there probably and I don't think I’m necessarily adding much by putting this bot out there, buuut I just make these for fun and I just hope you enjoy it regardless.

Admittedly I’m nervous about putting this out there, partially because of the bombing but also because I may be testing the scripts feature with this bot (big maybe, it’s a new feature to me and therefore I’ll need to tinker and research a lot before I do implementation of any kind). But I think it’ll be fine, as I want to give people the freedom to be their own character if possible, but also to allow for if you want to use a Wednesday persona for this bot or a Enid persona for the Wednesday bot since I personally haven’t seen too much of that.

Any feedback will be appreciated! Anything I can do to get this bot and the inevitable Wednesday bot to be as close to the characters as I can will be great.
creator: DahliaTheGeek
